creator: peterj@FreeBSD.org
text:
As a further datapoint:  I wandered if the timers were behaving so I have added some debug code to cross-check the DELAY()s in ahci_ctlr_reset() against real time and the JMB58x still fails to reset even with a 10s delay.

My next point of investigation will be ATA_INL() and ATA_OUTL().
